message:
Bound IMDS latency in AWS default credential chain

Stop mutating  at process startup and move IMDS behavior into explicit AWS SDK credential-provider configuration.

- remove automatic EC2/IMDS env-var mutation from tenzir startup
- add shared helper for default provider chain with bounded IMDS lookups
- configure default chain with metadataServiceTimeout=1s and attempts=1
- disable IMDSv1 while keeping IMDS enabled for EC2 instance profiles
- switch Kafka IAM default-chain callsites to the shared helper
